info.title: IMDb Complete Dataset Collection (2025)
info.subtitle: Comprehensive movies, TV shows, cast, crew, and ratings data, updated daily
info.description:
This dataset is a comprehensive collection of IMDb data, providing extensive information about movies, TV shows, and the entertainment industry. The collection includes seven key datasets:

1.**Title Basics**: Core information about movies, TV shows, and other media, including titles, release years, genres, and runtimes.

2.**Name Basics**: Details about individuals in the entertainment industry, including their primary profession and notable works.

3.**Title Ratings**: IMDb user ratings and vote counts for titles.

4.**Title Crew**: Directors and writers associated with each title.

5.**Title Episode**: Episode information for TV series, including season and episode numbers.

6.**Title Principals**: Key cast and crew for titles.

7.**Title Akas**: Alternative titles across different regions and languages.

The data has been processed and organized for analysis, with quality checks performed on each dataset. Each file is provided in CSV format for easy access and manipulation. To manage file sizes and processing times, datasets containing more than 1 million records have been randomly sampled while maintaining data integrity.

This collection is ideal for:
- Data analysis and visualization projects
- Research on entertainment industry trends
- Machine learning applications in media content
- Network analysis of cast/crew relationships
- Market analysis and content strategy

Last updated: February 2025
Data Source: IMDb (datasets.imdbws.com)
